## 📖 Documentation Issue

What type of documentation issue is this?

- [ ] Missing documentation
- [ ] Outdated documentation
- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Unclear explanations
- [ ] Broken links
- [ ] Formatting issues
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## 📍 Location

Where is the documentation issue?

- **File**: [e.g., docs/api.md, README.md]
- **Section**: [e.g., Installation, API Reference]
- **URL**: [if applicable]

## 🐛 Current Content

What does the current documentation say? (Include relevant text)

```markdown
[Copy the problematic text here]
```

## ✅ Suggested Fix

What should the documentation say instead?

```markdown
[Provide the corrected or improved text here]
```

## 🎯 Why This Matters

Why is this documentation issue important? How does it affect users?

## 📋 Additional Context

Add any screenshots, links, or additional information that helps understand the issue.

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I've identified the specific location of the issue
- [ ] I've provided the current content
- [ ] I've suggested a clear fix
- [ ] I've explained why this matters</content>
